text.title: Scope Drift Metrics — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the dashboard, metric-definition document, and trigger-log schemas.

forbidden.pattern: metrics map missing any of the five named metrics
threshold values absolute (count-based) instead of baseline-relative ratios
trigger entry without owner or sla_hours
red trigger open > sla_hours without escalation per risk-threshold-policy
dashboard.owner is a team name (e.g. "the BA team") instead of a named individual

allowed-transformations.transformation: Tighten thresholds after demonstrated low false-positive rate (≥4 weeks with ≤1 false amber per metric).
Add per-workstream slicing of metrics (e.g. front-end vs back-end) without removing the overall view.
Define engagement-specific exceptions (e.g. CR-velocity excludes typo-fix CRs) in metric-definitions.md.

list.item: All five metrics computed and displayed
Open triggers each have an owner and SLA
metric-definitions.md current and reviewed at last milestone
